name: linear-progress-sync
description: Start Codex implementation work from a linked Linear issue, branch, and draft PR, then safely sync progress.

interface.shortDescription: Start linked Linear work and sync progress safely.
interface.longDescription: Linear Progress Sync starts implementation work from a confirmed Linear issue, creates the linked branch and draft PR before code, then syncs Codex and Git activity to that active issue with safe comments only.
defaultPrompt: Start implementation from a linked Linear issue
Summarize queued Linear progress sync events
Drain the Linear progress sync queue safely
